title: selaginella siamensis
intro: Selaginella siamensis, also known as Thai spikemoss, is a species of evergreen, rhizomatous plant in the genus Selaginella. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Thai medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and promoting wound healing. Selaginella siamensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support overall well-being and alleviate specific health issues.
